title: 90°Black
description:
一个现代化风格的MinecraftGUI资源包，采用蓝黑配色和直角边框

A modern style Minecraft resource pack with blue and black color scheme and right Angle border
body:
### 中文
- **90°Black**资源包使Minecraft看起来更加简洁与现代化，采用蓝黑配色，直角边框，恰到好处的半透明或是渐变色。
- 此资源因此适用于PVP，生电等多种领域。
- 并且此资源包支持多个mod，目前包括**AppleSkin**, **Inventory HUD+**, **Inventory Profiles Next**, **REI物品管理器**
- 兼容性：Minecraft1.20.2+
### English
- The 90°Black resource pack makes Minecraft look simpler and more modern, featuring a blue black color scheme, right angled borders, and perfectly semi transparent or gradient colors.
- This resource is therefore applicable to various fields such as PVP.
- And this resource pack supports multiple mods, currently including **AppleSkin**, **Inventory HUD+**, **Inventory Profiles Next**, **Roughly Enough Items**
- Compatibility: Minecraft 1.20.2+
